headline: Stop coasting—you're twelve times too slow.
summary: You're losing at 1/12th the required pace; today you execute strict portions, zero snacking, and 45 minutes of rowing.
details: Food: Two Huel meals (breakfast/lunch), one proper vegan dinner with protein—nothing between, zero emotional snacking. Exercise: 45 minutes on the rowing machine hard and focused. Today matters: you've gained zero progress in seven days and the weekend snacking trap is 72 hours away. Build momentum now or repeat the failure.
